editorialTitle: Coordinate research work into steady progress.
editorialSubtitle: Bring tasks, evidence, conversations, and agent handoffs into one workspace, so the research process stays visible, organized, and moving.
petSubtitle: Keeping projects, evidence, and progress in view.

principles.oneBody: Tasks, evidence, and updates stay connected and easy to find.
principles.twoBody: Every conversation can turn into a concrete, visible next action.
principles.threeBody: Agents help coordinate routine work while people stay close to important decisions.

subtitle: Continue projects, tasks, and agent conversations in one place
footerPrimary: Project notes are saved so you can pick up where you left off
